---
description: Use when reviewing VirtRTLab specifications and docs for ambiguity, missing edge cases, and cross-document inconsistencies
---

Review the target docs as a contract reviewer, not as an implementer.

Produce:

1. Blockers
2. Majors
3. Minors
4. Questions
5. Positive points

Focus on testability, error behavior, naming consistency, and coherence between README.md and docs/.
